diagrams.title: Two's Complement Number Circle
diagrams.description: Circular representation showing how two's complement wraps around
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how two's complement arithmetic works mod 2^n and understand range boundaries

diagrams.title: Signed Integer Range Comparison
elements: Signed Magnitude: -127 to +127 (255 values, two zeros)
One's Complement: -127 to +127 (255 values, two zeros)
Two's Complement: -128 to +127 (256 values, one zero)
diagrams.purpose: Understand why two's complement is preferred due to having 256 distinct values and single zero representation

diagrams.title: Overflow Detection in Two's Complement Addition
elements: Positive overflow zone: adding two positives crossing into negative
Negative overflow zone: adding two negatives crossing into positive
Safe zone: opposite signs never overflow
diagrams.purpose: Visualize when overflow occurs in signed arithmetic operations

diagrams.title: Big-Endian vs Little-Endian Byte Ordering
diagrams.purpose: Understand how multi-byte integers are stored in memory in different architectures
